name: deeprank-static-site
description: Static DeepRank website with Netlify contact lead functions.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.check: node --check script.js && node --check admin/contact-leads.js && node --check netlify/functions/contact-leads.js && node --check scripts/build-static.js && node --check scripts/serve-static.js && npm run build && npm run test:unit
